creator: makc@issp.ac.ru
text:
mova and quick dictionaries are available under textproc/stardict2-dictd_mova 
and textproc/stardict2-quick ports, so they must be excluded from this port. 
The remains Big English-Russian dictionary and Dal' dictionary could be 
downloaded from stardict site. You can add Mueller dictionary also which is 
encoded in utf-8 and has correct transcription: 
http://prdownloads.sourceforge.net/stardict/stardict-mueller7-2.4.2.tar.bz2?download
By the way, Dal' dictionary is explanatory one, may be rename port to 
stardict2-dict-ru?

Max
